sections.paragraph:
εὐανθής, ές, gen. οῦς (ἄνθη, ‘full bloom’; Hom. et al.; Plut., Lucian, Aelian et al.; SEG VIII, 548, 8 [I b.c.]; Philo, Somn. 1, 205) beautifully blooming φυτά beautifully blooming plants ApcPt 5:15.—DELG s.v. ἄνθος.

gen. gen. = genitive

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 403
